name: MusicBrainz
author: Chronicle Contributors
description: Fetches comprehensive music metadata from MusicBrainz (artist, album, track) and cover art from the Cover Art Archive. No API key required.

background_tasks.description: Looks up metadata from MusicBrainz for newly imported artists, albums, and tracks that don't have it yet.
Re-downloads all MusicBrainz metadata to pick up corrections and updates.
